title: Razor Fist
content:
{{Character |image = Razor Fist Pro-pic.jpg |real name = Mattias{{Ref|SCatLotTRDS}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Razor Fist{{Ref|SCatLotTR}}}} |species = [[Human]] ([[Glossary#Cybernetically enhanced|Cyborg]]) |citizenship = {{Citizenship|ROM}} |gender = Male |affiliation = {{Affiliation|10R2}} |movie = ''[[Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings]]'' |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[The Ten Rings]]'' (voice) |actor = [[Florian Munteanu]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Your [[Xu Wenwu|father]] took me in and gave me a [[Ten Rings Headquarters|home]] and a purpose."
"And a [[Razor Fist's Prosthetic Blade|razor arm]]."
"It's a Razor Fist.|Razor Fist and [[Xu Xialing]]|Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings}} '''Mattias''' is the adoptive son of [[Xu Wenwu]] who was later trained to become an assassin for the [[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]] and was given a [[Razor Fist's Prosthetic Blade|retractable blade]] on his right arm, gaining him the name '''Razor Fist'''. Mattias was sent by Wenwu to retrieve his son, [[Xu Shang-Chi]], and later tracked him to the [[Golden Daggers Club]]. Mattias participated in the [[Battle of Ta Lo]] on the side of the Ten Rings, but later agreed to side with the [[Ta Lo]] warriors help defeat the forces of the [[Dweller-in-Darkness]]. After the battle and Wenwu's death, Mattias continued to serve the Ten Rings under [[Xu Xialing]]'s rule. ==Biography== {{MD|Razor Fist (Earth-199999)}} ===Early Life=== ====Discovered by Wenwu==== {{Quote|While I was on business in [[Romania]], I saw a boy on the street who reminded me of you. He was standing on a box, juggling three balls with his one arm. I was so impressed, I adopted Mattias as my own.|[[Xu Wenwu]] to [[Shang-Chi]]|Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings}} Mattias lived on the streets of [[Romania]], having lost his right hand. One day, while he was working as a juggler, he met [[Xu Wenwu]], who said that Mattias reminded him of his son, [[Shang-Chi]]. Wenwu adopted him, leading to him soon becoming a member of the [[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]]. When Wenwu offered him a new life and purpose, as well as a new home, Mattias started to look up to him as a father figure. Eventually Wenwu implanted a retractable razor blade into Mattias' arm to substitute his missing hand, after which Mattias gave himself the moniker "Razor Fist."{{Ref|SCatLotTRDS}} ===[[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]]=== ====[[Attack on Shang-Chi]]==== [[File:Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings 57.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Razor Fist furiously attacking [[Shang-Chi]]]] {{Quote|You and your [[Xu Xialing|sister]] deserve what's coming.|Razor Fist to [[Shang-Chi]]|Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings}} In [[2024]], Razor Fist was sent to [[San Francisco]], [[California]] on an assignment from [[Xu Wenwu]] to retrieve [[Shang-Chi]]'s [[Eyes of the Dragon|pendant]] which could help Wenwu discover how to find and enter [[Ta Lo]]. After tracking Shang-Chi on a bus, Razor Fist and other [[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]] agents infiltrated the bus and ambushed him. During the battle, Razor Fist used his [[Razor Fist's Prosthetic Blade|blade]] to slice the bus in half. Despite Shang-Chi's superior skills, Razor Fist managed to grab the pendant off him and succeed in his mission.{{Ref|SCatLotTR}} ====[[Attack on the Golden Daggers Club]]==== [[File:Shang-Chi New image4.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Razor Fist enters the [[Golden Daggers Club]]]] Razor Fist, along with [[Xu Wenwu]] and the [[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]], then travelled via [[Ten Rings Helicopter|helicopter]] to [[Macau]], [[China]] to the [[Golden Daggers Club]] in order to retrieve [[Xu Xialing]]'s [[Eyes of the Dragon|pendant]]. When they arrived, Razor Fist led the agents inside the Club where they spotted [[Shang-Chi]] and [[Katy Chen]]. He sent the agents after them while he went and retrieved the pendant from Xialing. Afterwards, he handed the pendant to Wenwu and watched as Wenwu was reunited with Shang-Chi.{{Ref|SCatLotTR}} ====Returning to Headquarters==== [[File:Group on helicopter.png|{{AltFloat}}|Razor Fist flies on the [[Ten Rings Helicopter]]]] {{Quote|They'll come back once I bring [[Ying Li|her]] home. Prepare the men for war."
"Yes, sir.|[[Xu Wenwu]] and Razor Fist|Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings}} Razor Fist then rode in the [[Ten Rings Helicopter|helicopter]] with [[Xu Wenwu]], [[Shang-Chi]], [[Katy Chen]], and [[Xu Xialing]] to the [[Ten Rings Headquarters]]. When Shang-Chi and Xialing refused to let Wenwu search for his wife, he knocked them to the ground. Chen tried to protest but Razor Fist subdued her and brought her to the prison.{{Ref|SCatLotTR}} ====[[Battle of Ta Lo]]==== [[File:Razor Fist (Ta Lo).png|{{AltFloat}}|Razor Fist being pulled back by [[Xu Xialing]]]] {{Quote|Your weapons are useless against [[Soul Eaters|them]]."
"We don't need your help! We are the mighty [[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]]! And— Okay, we should work together. Release them!|[[Ying Nan]] and Razor Fist|Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings}} Razor Fist later accompanied Wenwu's expedition to Ta Lo, leading to a stand-off between the Ten Rings and the villagers. As fighting broke out between the two sides, Razor Fist proceeded to attack Shang-Chi, only for Xialing to engage him instead so her brother could pursue Wenwu. In the midst of the battle, as Xialing managed to get Razor Fist in an armlock, [[Ying Nan]] announced that Wenwu had reached the Dark Gate. Xialing insisted they work together against the [[Soul Eaters]], but Razor Fist assumed it to be a trick and refused to believe Nan's claims that the weapons of the Ten Rings were useless against them. He was soon proven wrong as [[Death Dealer]] was swiftly killed and a Soul Eater that attacked Razor Fist proved impervious to his attacks until Nan destroyed it with her dragon scale staff. Acknowledging that the Ten Rings were outmatched, Razor Fist agreed to work with the villagers and ordered his men to follow suit. He then replaced his blade with a dragon scale blade to fight off the Soul Eaters. In the aftermath, Razor Fist partook in the lantern ceremony to honor the fallen.{{Ref|SCatLotTR}} ====New Leadership==== Following the [[Battle of Ta Lo]], Razor Fist returned with the remaining forces of the [[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]] to their [[Ten Rings Headquarters|base]]. With [[Xu Wenwu]] gone, his daughter, [[Xu Xialing]], took over leadership of the Ten Rings, bringing in her own staff from the [[Golden Daggers Club]], and beginning to reshuffle the entire organization. Razor Fist accompanied Xialing to her new throne, before she told him and [[Jon Jon]] they had a lot of work to do. Razor Fist stood loyally by her side as they oversaw the training of the next generation of Ten Rings warriors.{{Ref|SCatLotTR}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|A guy with a freakin' [[Razor Fist's Prosthetic Blade|machete]] for an arm just [[Attack on Shang-Chi|chopped]] our bus in half!|[[Katy Chen]] to [[Shang-Chi]]|Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings}} *'''Cybernetic Enhancement''': Mattias has a retractable razor blade implanted into his right arm to replace his missing hand. His blade was able to cut a bus in half. During the [[Battle of Ta Lo]], Mattias retracted his original blade and replaced it with a new magical one made of [[dragon]] [[Dragon Scale|scales]] that could cut through the [[Soul Eaters]] and most objects. ===Abilities=== *'''Expert Combatant''': As a member of the [[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]], Mattias is a highly skilled and formidable hand-to-hand combatant, having received extensive combat training. He was able to hold his own against [[Shang-Chi]] and [[Xu Xialing]]. *'''Sword Mastery''': ''To be added'' *'''Multilingualism''': Mattias is fluent in his native Romanian, as well as English, and can understand Mandarin. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Razor Fist's Prosthetic Blade]]''': Mattias possesses a prosthetic stump with a retractable blade on his right arm. After Mattias realized his blade was ineffective in killing the [[Soul Eaters]], he replaced it with a [[Dragon Scale]] blade. *'''[[Dragon Scale Dao]]''': Mattias wielded a dao in his free hand as he fought with the villagers against the Soul Eaters during the [[Battle of Ta Lo]]. ===Vehicles=== *'''[[Ten Rings Helicopter]]''': ''To be added'' *'''[[Razor Fist's Car|2021 BMW iX3]]''': This custom-painted electric BMW was hijacked by [[Katy Chen]], [[Shang-Chi]], [[Xu Xialing]] and [[Trevor Slattery]] when they fled the [[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]]' [[Ten Rings Headquarters|complex]]. ==Facilities== {{Expand}} *'''[[Ten Rings Headquarters]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Xu Wenwu]] † - Adoptive Father and Former Superior *[[Xu Shang-Chi]] - Adoptive Brother and Former Attempted Victim *[[Xu Xialing]] - Adoptive Sister, Former Attempted Victim and Superior ===Allies=== *[[Ten Rings (Organization)|Ten Rings]] **[[Death Dealer|Li Ching-Lin/Death Dealer]] † **[[Gao Lei]] † **[[Jon Jon]] - Former Enemy *[[Ta Lo Armed Forces]] - Former Enemies **[[Ying Nan]] - Savior **[[Guang Bo]] † *[[Katy Chen]] - Former Enemy *[[Trevor Slattery]] - Former Enemy *[[Morris]] *[[Great Protector]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Klev]] *[[Soul Eaters]] **[[Dweller-in-Darkness]] † {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, the original Razor-Fist was [[w:c:marvel:William Young|William Young]], who had razors on both of his hands. He was accompanied by [[Douglas Scott]] and [[w:c:marvel:William Scott|William Scott]], each of whom had only a single razor. Eventually, William Young and William Scott were both killed, and Douglas became the sole Razor-Fist, replacing his remaining hand with a razor. ==Behind the Scenes== *In a [[List of Deleted Scenes#Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings|deleted scene]], Razor Fist was originally set to die fighting the [[Soul Eaters]] after delivering a pep talk to [[Katy Chen]]. ==References== {{Gallery|Razor Fist/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} [[es:Razor Fist]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Cyborgs]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Assassins]] [[Category:Enhanced Individuals]] [[Category:Ten Rings Operatives]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]]
